# Third-party source

Vendored upstream code used by TC Automation Studio at runtime.

| Path | Upstream | License |
|------|----------|---------|
| `webwright/` | [microsoft/Webwright](https://github.com/microsoft/Webwright) | MIT — see `webwright/LICENSE` |

Project attribution, commit pin, local patches, and bundled-runtime notice policy:

- [NOTICE.md](./NOTICE.md)
- [../docs/THIRD_PARTY_LEGAL.md](../docs/THIRD_PARTY_LEGAL.md)

Do not edit upstream files for product-specific notes; record patches in `NOTICE.md` and
`webwright/VENDORED_VERSION.txt`.
